title: Bridge Essay: Unifying Theories of Psychedelic Drug Effects.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**Unifying Theories of Psychedelic Drug Effects.**. Front Pharmacol.. PMID: 29568270. DOI: 10.3389/fphar.2018.00172. How do psychedelic drugs produce their characteristic range of acute effects in perception, emotion, cognition, and sense of self? How do these effects relate to the clinical efficacy of psychedelic-assisted therapies? Efforts to understand psychedelic phenomena date back more than acentury in Western science.
